specific_mechanism: HELMHOLTZ-GRAD: curl-free + divergence-free split of gradient + curl-free-only update
llm_application: At each training step, project the per-step gradient onto the orthogonal direct sum of curl-free and divergence-free components; apply only the curl-free part to parameter updates; record the divergence-free part as a diagnostic.
novelty_claim: Null-LoRA/NP-LoRA project on parameter-space null; this projects on GRADIENT-FIELD Helmholtz split.
